
# Sale Properties by Run ID
This report shows the distribution of key characteristics for sales in each year (as defined by highest shap values).

```{r}
library(DBI)
library(ccao)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(htmltools)
library(noctua)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r}
noctua_options(cache_size = 10, unload = FALSE)

AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA <- dbConnect(noctua::athena(),
  rstudio_conn_tab = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
top10_cols <- dbGetQuery(AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA, glue::glue("
  SELECT * FROM model.shap
  WHERE run_id IN ('{params$run_id$run_id}', '{params$run_id$run_id_old}')
")) |>
  select(-pred_card_shap_baseline_fmv, -starts_with("time")) |>
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(abs(.)))) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "mean_abs") |>
  slice_max(mean_abs, n = 10) |>
  pull(column) |>
  as.list()
```

```{r}
min_year <- as.integer(substr(params$run_id$run_id_old, 1, 4)) - 10
max_year <- as.integer(substr(params$run_id$run_id, 1, 4))

sales <- dbGetQuery(AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA, glue::glue("
  SELECT pin, is_outlier, class, year, is_multisale
  FROM default.vw_pin_sale
  WHERE year BETWEEN '{min_year}' AND '{max_year}'")) %>%
  filter(is_multisale == FALSE)

characteristics <- dbGetQuery(AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA, glue::glue("
  SELECT meta_pin,
  ind_pin_is_multicard,
  {paste(top10_cols, collapse = ', ')}, year
  FROM model.vw_card_res_input
  WHERE year BETWEEN '{min_year}' AND '{max_year}'")) %>%
  filter(ind_pin_is_multicard == FALSE)

categorical_from_metadata <- dbGetQuery(AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA, glue::glue("
  SELECT model_predictor_categorical_name
  FROM model.metadata
  WHERE run_id = '{params$run_id$run_id}'
")) %>%
  pull(model_predictor_categorical_name) %>%
  gsub("\\[|\\]", "", .) %>%
  strsplit(", ") %>%
  unlist() %>%
  trimws()

char_cols <- unlist(top10_cols)
categorical_cols <- intersect(char_cols, categorical_from_metadata)
continuous_cols <- setdiff(char_cols, categorical_cols)

sales_with_characteristics <- sales %>%
  inner_join(characteristics, by = c("pin" = "meta_pin", "year"))
```
```{r}
# Continuous: box plots over time
plots_continuous <- lapply(continuous_cols, function(col) {
  df <- sales_with_characteristics %>%
    select(year, value = all_of(col)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(value))

  plot_ly(df,
    x = ~ factor(year), y = ~value, type = "box",
    name = col
  ) %>%
    layout(
      title = col,
      xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
      yaxis = list(title = "Value")
    )
})

# Categorical: stacked bar proportions over time
plots_categorical <- lapply(categorical_cols, function(col) {
  df <- sales_with_characteristics %>%
    select(year, value = all_of(col)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
    count(year, value) %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n))

  plot_ly(df,
    x = ~ factor(year), y = ~prop, color = ~ factor(value),
    type = "bar"
  ) %>%
    layout(
      title = col,
      barmode = "stack",
      xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
      yaxis = list(title = "Proportion", tickformat = ".0%")
    )
})
```
```{r results='asis'}
all_plots <- list(
  continuous = plots_continuous,
  categorical = plots_categorical
)
all_names <- c(continuous_cols, categorical_cols)
all_plots_flat <- c(plots_continuous, plots_categorical)

# Open tabset
cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")

for (i in seq_along(all_plots_flat)) {
  # Tab header
  cat("##", all_names[i], "\n\n")

  # Render the plotly widget inline
  print(htmltools::tagList(all_plots_flat[[i]]))

  cat("\n\n")
}

# Close tabset
cat(":::\n")
```
